review_note: Bridge candidate Kingdom of Bohemia is a shared-HRE-parent false positive. Accepted text support identifies Brunswick-Luneburg as an imperial principality of the HRE; Welf partitions and successor Hanover/Brunswick states remain out of scope.

Bridge candidate Kingdom of Prussia is a shared-North-German-Confederation-parent false positive. Existing evidence supports confederation state membership, not Prussian parentage.
